span.p:
Isaiah Jefferson
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Role: Product Owner, Architect,
Project Manager, Operator

Responsibilities:
• Vision & roadmap
• Requirements & priorities
• Architecture decisions
• Production operations
• Security approvals
• Credential management
• External communications

Claude Code
(claude-sonnet-4-6)
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Role: Lead Engineer

Responsibilities:
• Feature implementation
• Bug fixes & hotfixes
• Architecture design
• Schema & API design
• PRs & commits
• Code review
• Documentation

Config: .claude/
Tools: All (agents, skills, hooks)
